'''Gaitzi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] around the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was employed as part of a cleaning crew, known as the [[Tripod]], reporting to [[Jakaitis]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], [[Tahiri Veila]] impersonated her when sneaking into the [[Bakur Memorial Building|Bakuran Senate Complex]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
